'''Setongah''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] who was a member of [[Sebolto]]'s clan as of [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. He was wanted by the [[Pixelito Grand Council]] for peddling [[Death stick/Legends|death sticks]] to [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] youth. His [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] was claimed by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].<ref name="SG">[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Bounty Hunter'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Setongah is, according to the ''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]'', supposed to be the third bounty Jango encounters in the twelfth mission, "The Death Stick Factory", but in his place instead is [[Maree Yad]]. This is evidently one of the handful of mistakes made by the ''Official Strategy Guide'', as Setongah has the description of Maree, with Maree additionally appearing in place of where the ''Official Strategy Guide'' claims Setongah is.
